summary:
Nova's Terran units are improved versions of their regular Terran counterparts, with more HP and damage output. However, these come at a cost: her units are all charge-based and cannot be produced at will. This means that she will have to ensure she takes as few losses as possible during engagements. Her calldowns go a long way to achieving this goal.

Nova's difficulty of play is moderate. While simple micro can get players through a Brutal game, her playstyle rewards actively micromanaging units, liberal use of calldowns and an aggressive hero unit play.
